textByHash.ec0681508333117bca61eb4ddafa3329e97ba844: Be careful in here, there's lots of dangerous equipment.
textByHash.1ba6481b8760bb61a308baba469aaf4731da1c2b: Ah Ernest, top notch bloke. He's helping me with my experiments.
textByHash.ea5e3caecab9407a3bd140a17f3ac9efdc95fb0b: Oh, he isn't normally a chicken, or at least he wasn't until he helped me test my pouletmorph machine.
textByHash.b2aad7ab576b6b5a06968557d34e56cd7ef9a2d8: It was originally going to be called a transmutation machine. But after testing pouletmorph seems more appropriate.
textByHash.432708128ee9283552fb04b15cfc8710a13ce8bb: Ooh I dunno. She could have free eggs for breakfast.
textByHash.33d9804b88ee008ce8502b843973140200d7b61a: My machine is broken, and the house gremlins have run off with some vital bits.
textByHash.6240a1e1f377f9e3a03c83b86006e97149502e0c: That would be a help. They'll be somewhere in the manor house or its grounds, the gremlins never get further than the entrance gate.
textByHash.7ee7b495a33055b54b6798beddf3326c5dd7e277: I'm missing the pressure gauge and a rubber tube. They've also taken my oil can, which I'm going to need to get this thing started again.
textByHash.f7d5c491eb18a322b69d9943c246063eafb9b5eb: I need a rubber tube, a pressure gauge and a can of oil. Then your friend can stop being a chicken.
textByHash.4907bcf7546f53681d0bb70474fc33df411ccc09: It's a good start, but I'll need my pressure gauge and oil can too.
textByHash.d41943243470924c0aed4ccd0a98ced3576b1f32: It's a good start, but I'll need my oil can and rubber tube too.
textByHash.2ac31d4e50ed8aede2a09f39d8620bb78cb1ab51: It's a good start, but I'll need my pressure gauge and rubber tube too.
textByHash.5ff1536103e025d8f2a93f524703801982a3c0e6: That's good, but I still need my oil can.
textByHash.f992dad3e91ee601f6f03f469d7c1d5346dad4bb: That's good, but I still need my pressure gauge.
textByHash.77e43091c63532ed8a2f8cb0bf55799adcfa5bbd: That's good, but I still need my rubber tube.
textByHash.45a844b53575898bb579cc2c197d9005f5821b34: Nothing at the moment... It's broken. It's meant to be a transmutation machine.
textByHash.0350634541dfe8faf8283593178e47c7ba5dddc9: It has also spent time as a time travel machine, and a dramatic lightning generator, and a thing for generating monsters.
textByHash.c91aaf8a020e175944c9bccd152c3f5ad9e5db66: No, I'm just one of the tenants. It belongs to the count who lives in the basement.
textByHash.8a45456ea686bba773b4fb04d5f60012fb8e7a55: Ah, an interesting question! I believe it should create a rift in the very fabric of space! Opening a portal to some, hitherto undiscovered plane that exists parallel to our own.
textByHash.f5fde984d0e2f3ba01aa023b15d82d7559638056: Errr, just before you go through there...
textByHash.a753e95d21e512953de2db6a731c08ba11b71da1: That portal opens into a plane populated with some very shocking creatures. You should wear some kind of insulated armour before going there.
textByHash.d0718eab96af5a03f6399f6ed7388663b807ede0: Well there were some pretty tough people here last week. Said they were Slayer Masters. They were planning on making some protective boots. You should speak to one of them.
textByHash.921642bc2133313eca16c0c48b40dcdca0cbffd0: Fair enough, just don't say I didn't warn you
textByHash.85b097b5ea5fbbfa39a30ea89009b9b71f9735b0: Ok. Just don't say I didn't warn you
textByHash.ccc173a863fd2ca426374e86459b33e90a7e0150: before you go through there I must warn you that there are flashing lights and strobe effects on the other side. If you are an epilepsy sufferer you must NOT enter! Do you still want to go through?
textByHash.77d88eb8a38f5d975d1180317b18e0b16b163730: That's a good decision, if you ask me.
